name: Senor Check Cashing #11
description_short: Senor Check Cashing #11 offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and related financial services at a Houston location with extended hours.
description_long:
Senor Check Cashing #11 is a check-cashing storefront located in Houston, Texas on Glenmont Drive. The company operates as part of the larger Senor Check Cashing chain, which has multiple locations across the Houston area. The business serves customers seeking quick access to funds through check liquidation and related services.

The company's primary service is check cashing, with advertised rates starting at 1% of the check value. According to customer reviews, they charge a flat $2 fee for checks under $200, which differs from their advertised percentage-based pricing. They also offer money transfer services and wire transfers. The website lists additional services including title loans, car loans, credit cards, and prepaid cards, though these appear to be services offered through partnered lenders rather than directly provided.

Senor Check Cashing #11 operates extended hours six days a week (9AM-8PM most days, 9AM-9PM on Fridays) and is closed Sundays. They can be reached at +1 713-239-2964 or visited at their physical location. Customer ratings average 2.8 stars based on three reviews on the WeLoans directory listing.

The company has received mixed feedback regarding service quality and fee transparency. One customer praised their check cashing and money transfer capabilities but noted a change in management. However, two other reviewers reported poor customer service experiences and concerns about fee discrepancies between advertised rates (1%) and actual charges ($2 minimum on checks under $200). One reviewer also raised safety concerns about the store environment.
address: 6101 Glenmont Dr Ste F, Houston, TX 77081

company_info.headquarters: 6101 Glenmont Dr Ste F, Houston, TX 77081

pros: Extended operating hours (9AM-8PM weekdays, 9AM-9PM Friday) provide flexibility for working customers
Physical storefront location in Houston with dedicated customer service staff
Advertised 1% check-cashing rate starting point is competitive
Money transfer and wire transfer services available in addition to check cashing
Established chain with multiple locations across Houston area (at least 13 numbered locations)
Direct phone contact available (+1 713-239-2964) for customer inquiries
cons: Fee structure lacks transparency: advertises 1% rate but charges flat $2 for checks under $200, creating potential confusion and hidden costs
Low customer rating of 2.8 stars with multiple complaints about service quality and dishonest fee practices
Two of three available reviews report negative experiences including poor customer service from management and cashiers
Reported safety and security concerns from customers regarding store environment and lack of security presence
Website content suggests company offers services (title loans, car loans, credit cards) that appear to be partner offerings rather than direct services
best_for: Customers with checks under $200 who need immediate cash and understand the $2 flat fee structure
Houston-area residents who need money transfer or wire transfer services alongside check cashing
People seeking extended evening hours (9PM Friday) for after-work financial transactions
diagnosis: Best for Houston residents needing quick check cashing with extended evening hours, though fee transparency issues and mixed service quality reviews suggest comparing rates with other local check-cashing options first. The $2 flat fee on small checks can significantly exceed the advertised 1% rate for checks under $200.
services: Check cashing (1% rate advertised, $2 minimum for checks under $200)
